{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.0.0/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/slate.png
|block_health=30
|block_resistance=1
|rotation=stairs
|durability=60
|mass_damage=1.0
|hardness_damage=3.9
|swing_speed=3.2
|tags=stone, slate
|modifiers=good_at
}}



== Obtaining ==
Slate is easily the most plentiful stone block. It can be found in (but not exclusive to) temperate biomes, and is also the block most caves are made of below the surface.

== Usage ==
Slate is able to be used in tool crafting.

Slate can be crafted into bricks, tiles, and walls for decorative purposes.

== History ==

* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Blocks]]
[[Category:Materials]]
[[Category:Stone]]
